scripts.infra:deploy:env: CROP_ENV=dev AWS_REGION=ca-west-1 DEV_AWS_REGION=ca-west-1 PROD_AWS_REGION=us-west-1 API_DATABASE_MODE=external PROVISION_AWS_DATABASE=false ALLOW_LEGACY_ENV_FALLBACK=false REQUIRE_MODEL_OUTPUT=false pnpm run infra:deploy:compliance
scripts.infra:deploy:dev: CROP_ENV=dev AWS_REGION=ca-west-1 DEV_AWS_REGION=ca-west-1 PROD_AWS_REGION=us-west-1 API_DATABASE_MODE=external PROVISION_AWS_DATABASE=false ALLOW_LEGACY_ENV_FALLBACK=false REQUIRE_MODEL_OUTPUT=false pnpm run infra:deploy:compliance
scripts.infra:deploy:prod: CROP_ENV=prod AWS_REGION=us-west-1 DEV_AWS_REGION=ca-west-1 PROD_AWS_REGION=us-west-1 API_DATABASE_MODE=external PROVISION_AWS_DATABASE=false ALLOW_LEGACY_ENV_FALLBACK=false REQUIRE_MODEL_OUTPUT=true pnpm run infra:deploy:compliance
scripts.infra:deploy:compliance: pnpm run lambda:build:pymupdf-layer && pnpm --filter infra run deploy
